reasoning: Maria and the adobong sitaw diner are the only alcohol drinkers; with other mains fixed for the others, Althea must be the sitaw diner.
The adobong baboy eater drinks water and is not Althea; Janelle cannot have water, so Inday must be the baboy eater.
Clue states directly that Janelle ate bulanglang.
With bulanglang (Janelle) and adobong baboy (Inday) fixed and sitaw for Althea, the remaining main for Maria is asado.
Desserts left after assigning maruya (Inday), kutsinta (Maria), and buko pie (Janelle) leave turon saba for Althea.
Janelle did not get turon saba; with maruya for Inday and kutsinta tied to the asado eater (Maria), Janelle’s remaining dessert is buko pie.
The person with asado also had kutsinta; since Maria has asado, she has kutsinta.
Althea (the sitaw diner) is one of the two alcohol drinkers; since Maria cannot have beer (asado+kutsinta not beer), Althea drinks beer.
The adobong baboy eater drinks water and is not Althea; thus Inday drinks water.
Only two drank alcohol (Maria and the sitaw diner). Janelle is neither, and she also cannot have water, so she drinks milk.
Maria is an alcohol drinker, and the asado+kutsinta person cannot have beer, so Maria’s drink is wine.
